=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 7/26/03, Paso Robles, California, 1CDR

This recording has the same level problems on Tr.1 disc 1 described for the Lb1143. probably is a copy of it.
Great recording

Disc 1
01. Tombstone Blues, 02. I Don't Believe You, 03. Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum, 04. Under The Red Sky (acoustic), 05. Things Have Changed, 06. Highway 61 Revisited, 07. Positively 4th Street, 08. Drifter's Escape, 09. Watching The River Flow, 10. High Water (For Charley Patton), 11. Just Like A Woman

Disc 2 
01.crowd , 02. Honest With Me, 03. Bye And Bye, 04. Summer Days, 05. crowd, 06. Like A Rolling Stone, 07. All Along The Watchtower 


Concert # 1535 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 11 of the 2003 US Summer Tour. 2003 concert # 45.

Concert # 34 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & piano), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

2, 4, 7, 8, 9, 11 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
9, 12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).

8 new songs (50%) compared to previous concert. No new songs for this tour.
